programs.title: Move It Milkshakers!
programs.desc: Kemi and Derek are ready to 'Move It' as they introduce the letter B, exploring amazing things that begin with B, helping little ones discover letters, sounds and... Balance.

programs.title: Rubble & Crew
programs.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to find a construction solution when Charger's bouncy birthday surprise needs a lift.

programs.title: Peppa Pig
programs.desc: Mr Bull builds a brand-new club house and slide for Peppa and her friends. It is a lovely Club House with a slide on the side.

programs.title: Peppa Pig
programs.desc: Dr Brown Bear suggests Peppa and George have their hearing checked. The audiologist discovers George has a moderate hearing loss in one ear and suggests George tries a hearing aid.

programs.title: Tim Rex in Space
programs.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programs.title: Stan & Gran
programs.desc: Stan, Grace and Brody form a band, but a mystery drummer joins in somewhere across town. Stan and Gran go on a hunt for their invisible bandmate.
